name: dark-glassmorphism
description: 暗黑玻璃拟态风格 - 黑透磨砂面板、极光高光、发光核心、AI 控制中枢气质

typography.headers: Space Grotesk / SF Pro Display / Sora
typography.body: SF Pro Text / Inter / IBM Plex Sans

prompt_template: Dark glassmorphism PPT slide, premium AI control-plane aesthetic, obsidian background {background} with blurred aurora glow, smoked frosted glass panels, translucent KPI cards, thin luminous borders, subtle reflections, accent colors {palette}, clean modern sans-serif typography, elegant enterprise SaaS dashboard atmosphere, --ar {aspect_ratio} --style raw --v 6
negative_prompt: bright white background, pastel glass, brutalist blocks, vintage paper, photorealistic people, thick black outlines, playful stickers, rustic textures, cluttered collage, flat cartoon illustration, low-contrast text
